name: @vaultledger/obsidian-plugin
//: This is a leaf Obsidian plugin, not a library: Obsidian loads it via manifest.json -> the esbuild-bundled main.js, and no other workspace package imports it. So there is deliberately no main/types/exports here — those previously pointed at a pre-Phase-4 stub (dist/index.js) and were misleading residue.
